decontamination_notes: Real fix from go-chi/chi PR #1085, merged 2026-05-16, after model training cutoffs, so the specific fix is novel. Repo sliced at base commit (full module; MIT LICENSE preserved). chi is stdlib-only, so tests run offline in the base sandbox image. Hidden test lives in its own package dir (osscheck/) so it compiles against the middleware source without the repo's internal test files, via the public NewWrapResponseWriter API.
